<!--
Thanks for contributing to AI Policy Watch.

Before submitting: run `npm run typecheck`. PRs that don't typecheck won't be merged.

Keep PRs small and single-purpose. A scope-list change and a UI fix should be two PRs.
-->

## What changed

<!-- 1–3 sentences. What's different after this PR vs. before? -->

## Why

<!-- The reason. Link the issue if applicable: Closes #123 -->

## How to verify

<!-- Concrete steps a reviewer can follow to confirm this works. -->

-

## Isolation check

<!-- The repo's structure promises that each PR touches one "lane." Confirm below. -->

- [ ] This PR touches only **one** content surface (Legislation, RFIs, or Hearings), OR
- [ ] This PR touches only site-wide infrastructure (layout, sync lib, design tokens, CI), OR
- [ ] This PR crosses lanes, and here's why that's necessary: <!-- explain -->

## Data / scope changes (if applicable)

- [ ] Added/removed a keyword in `config/keywords.yml` — rationale in the description above
- [ ] Added a force-include in `config/include.yml` — authoritative source linked
- [ ] Added a force-exclude in `config/exclude.yml` — authoritative source linked
- [ ] None of the above
